name: Ho Chi Minh City
description: Vietnam's relentless, dizzying megacity — a place where French colonial architecture rises above a river of motorbikes, where you can eat the world's best banh mi for $1, and where history, hustle, and heart collide on every street corner.

quickInfo.visa: E-visa available online, 90 days, multiple entry. Free visa-on-arrival for some nationalities.

hotels.name: The Common Room Project
hotels.description: Backpacker haven steps from Bui Vien Walking Street with great social vibe and rooftop bar

hotels.name: Liberty Central Saigon Citypoint
hotels.description: Well-located hotel with rooftop pool and panoramic views of Saigon's skyline

hotels.name: Hotel des Arts Saigon
hotels.description: Art-deco boutique hotel with Indochine-inspired interiors and rooftop infinity pool

hotels.name: Park Hyatt Saigon
hotels.description: Saigon's most prestigious address — colonial elegance across from the French Opera House

hotels.name: The Reverie Saigon
hotels.description: Vietnam's most opulent hotel: Italian marble, chandeliers, and butler service on every floor

activities.name: Cu Chi Tunnels Half-Day Tour
activities.description: Crawl through the legendary Viet Cong tunnel network used during the Vietnam War

activities.name: Mekong Delta Boat & Village Tour
activities.description: Cruise the Mekong by sampan, visit floating markets, taste coconut candy, and cycle through villages

activities.name: Saigon Street Food Evening Tour by Motorbike
activities.description: Ride pillion on a vintage Honda through 10+ hidden food stalls — the ultimate Saigon experience

activities.name: War Remnants Museum & Reunification Palace
activities.description: Vietnam's most powerful museum, then tour the historic presidential palace frozen in 1975

activities.name: Cooking Class: Vietnamese Street Food
activities.description: Learn to make pho, banh mi, goi cuon fresh rolls, and Vietnamese iced coffee

items.activity: Notre-Dame Cathedral & Central Post Office (French colonial icons)
District 1 café crawl: cà phê trứng (egg coffee)
Bui Vien Walking Street setup (bars open at 5pm)
Rooftop bar dinner — Saigon skyline views

3days.title: Cu Chi Tunnels & Street Food Night

items.activity: Tan Dinh Market: pink church and street food
Village lunch: elephant ear fish, hot pot
Return to Ho Chi Minh City

practicalInfo.gettingThere: Tan Son Nhat International Airport (SGN) — Vietnam's busiest airport. Direct flights from Singapore, Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur, Seoul, Tokyo, Hong Kong, and many European cities. Taxi to city center: 30 min, ~$8. Grab app recommended.
practicalInfo.localTransport: Grab is king — use it for everything (motorbike or car). Motorbike taxis (xe om) for adventurous travelers. Buses exist but complex. Walking fine in District 1.
